channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: microsoft /ai-agents-for-beginners | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents

item.title: colbymchenry /codegraph | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

item.title: plausible /analytics | Elixir | N/A
item.description: Open source, privacy-first web analytics. Lightweight, cookie-free Google Analytics alternative. Self-hosted or cloud.

item.title: knadh /listmonk | Go | N/A
item.description: High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

item.title: medusajs /medusa | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The world's most flexible commerce platform.

item.title: TryGhost /Ghost | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Independent technology for modern publishing, memberships, subscriptions and newsletters.

item.title: KeygraphHQ /shannon | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.

item.title: Light-Heart-Labs /DreamServer | Python | N/A
item.description: Local AI anywhere, for everyone — LLM inference, chat UI, voice, agents, workflows, RAG, and image generation. No cloud, no subscriptions.

item.title: K-Dense-AI /scientific-agent-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

item.title: NirDiamant /agents-towards-production | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: End-to-end, code-first tutorials for building production-grade GenAI agents. From prototype to enterprise deployment.

item.title: tech-leads-club /agent-skills | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The secure, validated skill registry for professional AI coding agents. Extend Antigravity, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and more with absolute confidence.

item.title: BigBodyCobain /Shadowbroker | Python | N/A
item.description: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

item.title: Anil-matcha /Open-Generative-AI | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

item.title: oven-sh /bun | Rust | N/A
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: tinyhumansai /openhuman | Rust | N/A
item.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
